company.name_jp: 株式会社ヒューマンアンドテクノロジ

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established August 1993 (Heisei 5). Capital: 10 million JPY. Employees: 30. Sales: 249 million JPY (FY2022). Located in Aoba-ku, Yokohama. CEO: 濱田篤由. Business: Railway systems, electronic money, embedded systems, business applications.
